title: Tandem Repeats
description:
Tandem Repeats occur in DNA when a pattern of one or more nucleotides is repeated,and the repetitions are directly adjacent to each other. For example, consider the sequence:

  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG

This contains 9 Tandem Repeats:

  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG
  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG
  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG
  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG
  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG
  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG
  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG
  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG
  • ATTCGATTCGATTCG

Given a nucleotide sequence, how many Tandem Repeats occur in it?
input: There will be several test cases in the input. Each test case will consist of a single string on its own line, with from 1 to 100,000 capital letters, consisting only of A, G, T and C. This represents a nucleotide sequence. The input will end with a line with a single 0.
output: For each test case, output a single integer on its own line, indicating the number Tandem Repeats in the nucleotide sequence. Output no spaces, and do not separate answers with blank lines.
source: ICPC, Regionals, North America, Southeast USA Regional, 2013 Southeast USA Regional Programming Contest, Division 1
